entry.title: New: RES25-157 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $1,642.99, TO THE CITY FROM THE INCIDENT MANAGEMENT TEAMS ASSOCIATION (IMTA) FOR THE DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT TO ATTEND THE IMTA STRATEGIC MANAGEMENT MEETING IN COLUMBIA, SOUTH CAROLINA, FROM JUNE 21-22, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
